RenoiseScriptingTool.Author: halebp (based on SuperNudge by pandabot)
RenoiseScriptingTool.Name: HyperNudge
RenoiseScriptingTool.Description: Moves column entries (notes and effects) up and down in both the Pattern Editor and the Phrase Editor. Notes can be moved by 1 step (delay value) or by 1 line; effects by 1 line. Works with cursor position or with a selection. Phrase Editor features: wrap-around at phrase boundaries, step nudge with selection, and nudge all columns simultaneously. All actions are available as keybindings and MIDI mappings.
